catalyst.event: BYD Q1 2026 earnings release expected to confirm gross margin compression below 18% (vs FY2024 ~20%) due to domestic price war intensification and overseas ramp costs, with management forced to lower 2026 volume guidance from 5.5M to ~5.0M units
catalyst.date_or_window: 2026-04-28 (±5 days, BYD historical Q1 release window)
catalyst.source: BYD prior 4 quarters earnings release pattern (late April Q1 disclosure); CPCA monthly wholesale data trend showing BYD domestic ASP declining QoQ since Q3 2025

rightIf_conditions: Q1 2026 reported gross margin prints below 18.0% (vs consensus 19.8%)
BYD FY2026 volume guidance cut from 5.5M to ≤5.1M units at any quarterly call before Q3 2026
FY2026 sell-side consensus EPS revised down ≥10% within 30 days of Q1 release
Forward P/E compresses to ≤17x within 4 months of Q1 release
wrongIf_conditions: Q1 2026 gross margin ≥19.5% — exit short within 3 trading days
BYD raises FY2026 volume guidance OR overseas (ex-China) shipment ratio exceeds 20% in any quarter — cover entire position
Stock rallies >15% from entry on positive catalyst (e.g. major export order, new tech inflection like solid-state battery commercialization announcement) — stop loss
what_changes_our_mind: Q1 2026 reported gross margin ≥ 19.5% AND BYD maintains FY2026 volume guidance at ≥5.5M units AND overseas (ex-China) shipment ratio ≥18% — would invalidate the margin-compression thesis and confirm consensus operating leverage path.
time_to_resolution: 6 months (through August 2026, covering Q1 and Q2 2026 earnings)

expected_pnl_asymmetry.upside_if_right: +25% to +35% (short P&L on price decline from current ~RMB 290 to fair value RMB 200-220)
expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: -12% to -15% (cover stop on positive surprise rally)

quantification.metric_target: Q1 2026 reported gross margin + FY2026 EPS consensus revision magnitude + forward P/E
quantification.current_value: Q4 2025 GM 19.4%; FY2026 consensus EPS RMB 17.2; forward P/E ~22x
quantification.predicted_value: Q1 2026 GM 17.0-17.8%; FY2026 EPS revised to RMB 14.5-15.0 (-13 to -16%); P/E compresses to 15-16x

predicted_range.low: Q1 GM 16.5%, EPS revision -20%, target price RMB 200
predicted_range.mid: Q1 GM 17.5%, EPS revision -15%, target price RMB 230
predicted_range.high: Q1 GM 18.5%, EPS revision -8%, target price RMB 270

quantification.predicted_horizon: 6 months (through Q1 + Q2 2026 earnings cycle, resolution by August 2026)
